docs/hooks.md:code-comment:toml:7b865f7a.translation: An inline actions array, executed in array order.

docs/hooks.md:code-comment:toml:a524838b.translation: When there is no need to call Host tools, the entire [plugin.runtime.tools] can be omitted.

docs/hooks.md:code-comment:toml:bb1c0ade.translation: TOML array table, executed in declaration order.

docs/hooks.md:code-comment:toml:d722db68.translation: Block subsequent slash commands and LLM processing

docs/hooks.md:list:06952113f5b0a4361c6ad.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ / __ELBOT_CODE_2__：平台群身份，由平台适配器映射。
docs/hooks.md:list:06952113f5b0a4361c6ad.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ / __ELBOT_CODE_2__: platform group identities, mapped by the platform adapter.

docs/hooks.md:list:09359a97d5ffad125621f.source: 不设 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时脚本只产出 outputs，不修改原文（适合"检测到内容就发通知但不改原文"的场景）。
docs/hooks.md:list:09359a97d5ffad125621f.translation: When __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is not set, the script only produces outputs without modifying the original text (suitable for scenarios such as "send a notification when content is detected but do not modify the original text").

docs/hooks.md:list:0f15fd574716c563e6eee.source: exec response 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 覆写会重建为纯 text segment，原图片和文件 segment 会丢失。
docs/hooks.md:list:0f15fd574716c563e6eee.translation: Overwriting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in the exec response will reconstruct it as a pure text segment, and the original image and file segments will be lost.

docs/hooks.md:list:1afb8182c866497b73b13.source: 阻断策略命中、worker 退出、停止或重载会清理该插件租约。
docs/hooks.md:list:1afb8182c866497b73b13.translation: Blocking strategy hits, worker exits, stops, or reloads will clear the plugin lease.

docs/hooks.md:list:28423a1a6109655580487.source: 若并发事件使多个 Hook 同时竞争，最后写入者覆盖此前租约。
docs/hooks.md:list:28423a1a6109655580487.translation: If concurrent events cause multiple Hooks to compete simultaneously, the last writer overwrites the previous lease.

docs/hooks.md:list:28d01b9f2d4ced97f17ff.source: 插件返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，再从后续规则继续传播，最后可进入命令或主 LLM。
docs/hooks.md:list:28d01b9f2d4ced97f17ff.translation: When the plugin returns __ELBOT_CODE_0__, propagation continues from subsequent rules, and can finally enter a command or the main LLM.

docs/hooks.md:list:343fe68f6abd6d2032b06.source: 实现每条路由只存一份租约；
docs/hooks.md:list:343fe68f6abd6d2032b06.translation: Ensuring that only one lease is stored per route;

docs/hooks.md:list:372ffa05b8b07cfa4e27d.source: Host 先将后续消息以 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 路由给持有租约的 Hook；
docs/hooks.md:list:372ffa05b8b07cfa4e27d.translation: The Host first routes subsequent messages to the Hook holding the lease via __ELBOT_CODE_0__;

docs/hooks.md:list:37308b78e6f529aae7de7.source: 不设 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 为空时不修改原文。
docs/hooks.md:list:37308b78e6f529aae7de7.translation: The original text will not be modified if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is not set or if __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is empty.

docs/hooks.md:list:37c40c7700b5e8f340c46.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 只处理 text segment；图片和文件保留。
docs/hooks.md:list:37c40c7700b5e8f340c46.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ only process text segments; images and files are preserved.

docs/hooks.md:list:3f978bf24294ecd869216.source: 再次返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 则以新 ID、过期时间续期。
docs/hooks.md:list:3f978bf24294ecd869216.translation: Returning __ELBOT_CODE_0__ again will renew it with a new ID and expiration time.

docs/hooks.md:list:43baa18d68254993ba1ee.source: continuation 放行后不会用同一条消息重新触发刚结束 waiting 的插件。
docs/hooks.md:list:43baa18d68254993ba1ee.translation: After the continuation is released, the plugin that just finished waiting will not be re-triggered by the same message.

docs/hooks.md:list:4b82141662c7ae2104bd3.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__：__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 是媒体来源，__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 是 fallback；
docs/hooks.md:list:4b82141662c7ae2104bd3.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__: __ELBOT_CODE_2__ is the media source, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ is the fallback;

docs/hooks.md:list:539770aafedf59f4b17b0.source: 常规规则完成且消息未被 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 后，Host 将后续消息以 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 路由给持有租约的 Hook。
docs/hooks.md:list:539770aafedf59f4b17b0.translation: After regular rules are completed and the message has not been __ELBOT_CODE_0__, the Host will route subsequent messages via __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to the Hook holding the lease.

docs/hooks.md:list:557fc0dba2fa2cc07c312.source: 若并发事件使多个 worker 同时竞争，最后写入者覆盖此前租约。
docs/hooks.md:list:557fc0dba2fa2cc07c312.translation: If concurrent events cause multiple workers to compete simultaneously, the last writer overrides the previous lease.

docs/hooks.md:list:5918b0b181ab94e546c4a.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 返回的相对媒体 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 始终相对声明规则的插件目录；根规则则相对 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/hooks.md:list:5918b0b181ab94e546c4a.translation: The relative media __ELBOT_CODE_1__ returned by __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is always relative to the plugin directory of the declared rule; root rules are relative to __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/hooks.md:list:6048f2efe3433aeca7ecc.source: 没有 text segment 时新增 text segment；
docs/hooks.md:list:6048f2efe3433aeca7ecc.translation: Add a text segment when no text segment exists;

docs/hooks.md:list:6c2eaf42edef0b218ac26.source: 对于 transient worker，同时关闭该进程。
docs/hooks.md:list:6c2eaf42edef0b218ac26.translation: For transient workers, the process is closed simultaneously.

docs/hooks.md:list:6e310b614db8b0bba36a5.source: 因此多个持久 Hook 可能匹配同一路由时，应使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、更严格条件或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 明确归属。
docs/hooks.md:list:6e310b614db8b0bba36a5.translation: Therefore, when multiple persistent Hooks might match the same route, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, stricter conditions, or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ should be used to clarify ownership.

docs/hooks.md:list:7e6945229958122f2d301.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 修改首个或最后一个 text segment；
docs/hooks.md:list:7e6945229958122f2d301.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ modify the first or last text segment;

docs/hooks.md:list:8349d4a7985d726b6f7aa.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__（旧内嵌插件的配置项）不再需要；脚本里直接写相对 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 的目录路径。
docs/hooks.md:list:8349d4a7985d726b6f7aa.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ (the configuration item for the old embedded plugin) is no longer needed; the directory path relative to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is written directly in the script.

docs/hooks.md:list:8cf612138d4daf8e356d4.source: 当 action 设了 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会整体覆写该字段（走可编辑字段校验）；
docs/hooks.md:list:8cf612138d4daf8e356d4.translation: When action is set to __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will completely overwrite the field (subject to editable field validation);

docs/hooks.md:list:8faba9089ffef7ec50211.source: 因此多个 worker Hook 可能匹配同一路由时，应使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、更严格条件或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 明确归属。
docs/hooks.md:list:8faba9089ffef7ec50211.translation: Therefore, when multiple worker Hooks may match the same route, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, stricter conditions, or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ should be used to clarify ownership.

docs/hooks.md:list:967c3904bd19fd0a3f96c.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is the platform's original user ID;

docs/hooks.md:list:96c3f65b3f393124a5527.source: waiting 存在时，普通 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 规则仍会先运行；worker trigger rule 不会再次触发。
docs/hooks.md:list:96c3f65b3f393124a5527.translation: When waiting exists, ordinary __ELBOT_CODE_0__ rules will still run first; worker trigger rules will not be triggered again.

docs/hooks.md:list:976dfaca6c82d7c74f130.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：每项格式与 send segments 一致，转换为输出意图发送到平台。
docs/hooks.md:list:976dfaca6c82d7c74f130.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: Each item's format is consistent with send segments and is converted into an output intent to be sent to the platform.

docs/hooks.md:list:9e3d263ac06e54491c642.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 为 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或省略时不额外设置 exec 超时；不能为负数。
docs/hooks.md:list:9e3d263ac06e54491c642.translation: When __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or omitted, no additional exec timeout is set; it cannot be a negative number.

docs/hooks.md:list:a064c87f52fe7748f012d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 控制表情发送时机：__ELBOT_CODE_1__（默认）在 LLM 文本输出前发送，__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 在 assistant 回复后发送。
docs/hooks.md:list:a064c87f52fe7748f012d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ controls the timing of emoticon delivery: __ELBOT_CODE_1__ (default) sends before the LLM text output, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ sends after the assistant's reply.

docs/hooks.md:list:af2fb583dc8d03e89ea5e.source: continuation 返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或省略 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 后，Host 立即释放租约；
docs/hooks.md:list:af2fb583dc8d03e89ea5e.translation: After the continuation returns __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or omits __ELBOT_CODE_1__, the Host immediately releases the lease;

docs/hooks.md:list:b1405955c15839b5791d1.source: waiting 存在时，普通 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 规则仍会先运行；持久 trigger rule 不会再次触发。
docs/hooks.md:list:b1405955c15839b5791d1.translation: When waiting exists, ordinary __ELBOT_CODE_0__ rules will still run first; persistent trigger rules will not be triggered again.

docs/hooks.md:list:b9418824865de67554572.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 让脚本返回的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 覆写 LLM 响应文本，移除已被提取的 token。
docs/hooks.md:list:b9418824865de67554572.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ allows the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ returned by the script to overwrite the LLM response text, removing the extracted tokens.

docs/hooks.md:list:bae390a30ba2327ed20f4.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 是表情名，__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 可指定本地媒体；
docs/hooks.md:list:bae390a30ba2327ed20f4.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is the emoji name, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ can specify local media;

docs/hooks.md:list:c8aa19094b7370c9f0cb0.source: 正常串行分发中，首个返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 worker 持有该路由，后续 worker trigger rule 不会再分发该路由。
docs/hooks.md:list:c8aa19094b7370c9f0cb0.translation: In normal serial distribution, the first worker to return __ELBOT_CODE_0__ holds the route, and subsequent worker trigger rules will no longer distribute this route.

docs/hooks.md:list:ddf9d1675dbfa741f9be4.source: 根 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的规则默认在 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 目录执行；其 cwd 可为相对路径或绝对路径。
docs/hooks.md:list:ddf9d1675dbfa741f9be4.translation: Rules for the root __ELBOT_CODE_0__ are executed in the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ directory by default; its cwd can be a relative or absolute path.

docs/hooks.md:list:de0027282c3d2752f7e28.source: continuation 被路由后，消息不会再进入 slash 命令或主 LLM，即使 response 中 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 为 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/hooks.md:list:de0027282c3d2752f7e28.translation: After the continuation is routed, messages will no longer enter slash commands or the main LLM, even if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in the response is __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:list:e5b19b88756192f63c27c.source: 插件内规则的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 默认插件目录；显式 cwd 必须是插件目录内的相对路径。
docs/hooks.md:list:e5b19b88756192f63c27c.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of rules within a plugin defaults to the plugin directory; an explicit cwd must be a relative path within the plugin directory.

docs/hooks.md:list:fb494466f60b87910be9b.source: 正常串行分发中，首个返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的持久 Hook 持有该路由，后续持久 trigger rule 不会再分发该路由。
docs/hooks.md:list:fb494466f60b87910be9b.translation: In normal serial distribution, the first persistent Hook that returns __ELBOT_CODE_0__ holds the route, and subsequent persistent trigger rules will no longer distribute this route.

docs/hooks.md:list:fe1650a3726bc2f75cebd.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 是平台消息 ID，__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 是回复正文。
docs/hooks.md:list:fe1650a3726bc2f75cebd.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is the platform message ID, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ is the reply body.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:00549b4a400460b7.source: 普通规则使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。规则先按 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、条件和角色匹配，再顺序执行 actions。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:00549b4a400460b7.translation: Ordinary rules use __ELBOT_CODE_0__. Rules are first matched by __ELBOT_CODE_1__, conditions, and roles, and then actions are executed sequentially.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:00cce64173acdb39.source: 省略 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或省略 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 等价于 __ELBOT_CODE_2__：普通规则 Hook 或一次性 __ELBOT_CODE_3__，没有常驻 worker。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:00cce64173acdb39.translation: Omitting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or omitting __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is equivalent to __ELBOT_CODE_2__: a regular rule Hook or a one-time __ELBOT_CODE_3__, with no resident worker.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0210da0c8771c158.source: 处理顺序是：先运行 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Hook；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0210da0c8771c158.translation: The processing order is: first run the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Hook;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0239e99b422fdd91.source: 持久 Hook JSON output 使用另一套字段：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0239e99b422fdd91.translation: Persistent Hook JSON output uses another set of fields:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:02b934a9097a349f.source: stdout 只能写协议帧，日志写 stderr。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:02b934a9097a349f.translation: stdout can only be used to write protocol frames; logs should be written to stderr.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0358af386fb0972a.source: 对于由 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ trigger rule 以 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 匹配后启动的首次调用，插件通常无需再次校验同一唤醒前缀或指令文本；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0358af386fb0972a.translation: For the first call triggered by a __ELBOT_CODE_0__ trigger rule matched with __ELBOT_CODE_1__, the plugin usually does not need to verify the same wake-up prefix or command text again;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:05a826188a168a37.source: 省略 target 时沿用当前事件目标。规则 TOML target 使用 snake_case，不要混写。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:05a826188a168a37.translation: When target is omitted, the current event target is used. Rule TOML targets use snake_case; do not mix them.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:05e4b90b8c61f6bb.source: **不执行 ElBot 的风险分级、权限策略或交互确认**。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:05e4b90b8c61f6bb.translation: **Does not execute ElBot's risk grading, permission policies, or interaction confirmations**.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:060a41dca9836485.source: Hook 不直接调用平台发送接口；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:060a41dca9836485.translation: Hooks do not directly call the platform's sending interface;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0720f17c9fef9af3.source: waiting 租约也以该三元组为 key：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0720f17c9fef9af3.translation: The waiting lease also uses this triplet as the key:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:07ee05deedf689ce.source: 可用 method 则随运行模式不同。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:07ee05deedf689ce.translation: Available methods vary depending on the execution mode.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:084cf67937f1fdb4.source: ElBot 启动和 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 后会自动启动已启用的持久 Hook；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:084cf67937f1fdb4.translation: ElBot will automatically start enabled Persistent Hooks after startup and __ELBOT_CODE_0__;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:086a02ef2f2d8ca8.source: 需要全字段约束时在正则中使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:086a02ef2f2d8ca8.translation: Use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ in the regular expression when full-field constraints are required.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:089bf645e5ad5e1f.source: 不带 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 不会收到 __ELBOT_CODE_2__；但如果请求失败，当前 exec action 仍会失败并触发 Hook 失败通知。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:089bf645e5ad5e1f.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_1__ without __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will not receive __ELBOT_CODE_2__; however, if the request fails, the current exec action will still fail and trigger a Hook failure notification.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:0a24aad30a89e140.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 属于整组 outputs，不属于单个 segment。

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:710a1ede158dc38c.source: stdout 只能写协议帧，日志写 stderr。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:710a1ede158dc38c.translation: stdout can only be used to write protocol frames; logs should be written to stderr.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:723ca588b553716a.source: 配置了 action __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，存在的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 覆写该字段；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:723ca588b553716a.translation: When action __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is configured, the existing __ELBOT_CODE_1__ overrides this field;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:72951dfc6191226b.source: 规则可用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 做权限分区：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:72951dfc6191226b.translation: Rules can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ for permission partitioning:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7348947213fd2746.source: 脚本以相同 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ ID 写 response。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7348947213fd2746.translation: The script writes the response using the same __ELBOT_CODE_0__ ID.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7368b2498b97a79d.source: 事件数据位于 __ELBOT_CODE_0__；规则正则捕获位于 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。示例只展开常用字段，实际 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 字段见后文“模板与字段”。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7368b2498b97a79d.translation: Event data is located in __ELBOT_CODE_0__; rule regex captures are located in __ELBOT_CODE_1__. The example only expands commonly used fields; for actual __ELBOT_CODE_2__ fields, see "Templates and Fields" below.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7407ad89fdf057bf.source: 持久 Hook 会持续处理多个事件，并额外接收 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、可能收到 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7407ad89fdf057bf.translation: A persistent Hook continuously processes multiple events and additionally receives __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and may receive __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:751676c6acd39a2b.source: 也就是说，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以让 Hook 看见未唤起消息，但不会自动让 LLM 处理群里所有消息。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:751676c6acd39a2b.translation: In other words, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ allows the Hook to see untriggered messages, but it will not automatically let the LLM process all messages in the group.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:756c7814a424497d.source: 可以把下面内容保存为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，用于让 LLM 按需求生成规则 Hook 配置和可选 exec 脚本。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:756c7814a424497d.translation: You can save the following content as __ELBOT_CODE_0__, which allows the LLM to generate rule Hook configurations and optional exec scripts as needed.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:758444f69e1d0a18.source: 输出格式分三种；字段不能混写。下面先给容易混淆的字段对照，后续章节再分别展开。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:758444f69e1d0a18.translation: There are three types of output formats; fields cannot be mixed. Below is a comparison of fields that are easily confused, which will be expanded upon in subsequent sections.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:75d6020ac1f84dc2.source: Hook 和插件不直接发平台消息，应返回输出意图，由 Agent 统一交给 Output Manager 发送。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:75d6020ac1f84dc2.translation: Hooks and plugins do not send platform messages directly; they should return an output intent, which is then handed over by the Agent to the Output Manager for sending.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:76357b09554c962a.source: 持久 Hook 管理自己的 LLM loop 和业务状态。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:76357b09554c962a.translation: Persistent Hooks manage their own LLM loop and business state.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:764b6e68ee85910b.source: 等待路由只捕获发起者在同一 scope 的后续消息；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:764b6e68ee85910b.translation: The wait route only captures subsequent messages from the initiator within the same scope;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7672a4198472ba16.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可省略，省略等价于空 allowlist：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7672a4198472ba16.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be omitted; omitting it is equivalent to an empty allowlist:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:76b236159b319555.source: 普通规则的文本和 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 支持 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 模板，例如 __ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__、__ELBOT_CODE_5__、__ELBOT_CODE_6__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_7__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:76b236159b319555.translation: The text and __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of ordinary rules support __ELBOT_CODE_1__ templates, such as __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__, __ELBOT_CODE_6__, and __ELBOT_CODE_7__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:78101b2061e322db.source: 不要把大数据塞进 JSON Pipe。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:78101b2061e322db.translation: Do not stuff large amounts of data into the JSON Pipe.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7821e93054a5b562.source: 阻断三项任一命中即不调用该插件规则或 __ELBOT_CODE_0__；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7821e93054a5b562.translation: If any of the three items are hit, the plugin rule or __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will not be called;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:798db0dd045a98e7.source: 输出由 ElBot 的 Output Manager 统一落到平台。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:798db0dd045a98e7.translation: Output is uniformly delivered to the platform by ElBot's Output Manager.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7b36efcc39767035.source: 它不是插件目录，也不会被扫描。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7b36efcc39767035.translation: It is not a plugin directory and will not be scanned.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7b44e01416c52581.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 规则遇到已唤起消息时会直接跳过，不影响后续插件、命令或主 LLM。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7b44e01416c52581.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ rules will skip directly when encountering awakened messages, without affecting subsequent plugins, commands, or the main LLM.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7bb62ce238fb635c.source: 每条规则可以写单个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或多个 __ELBOT_CODE_1__（按顺序执行）。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7bb62ce238fb635c.translation: Each rule can contain a single __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or multiple __ELBOT_CODE_1__ (executed in order).

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7bea9e9462cd3965.source: 需要由插件动态决定是否拦截时，在 stdout 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ response 中返回 __ELBOT_CODE_1__：__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 表示当前插件接管消息，__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 表示继续交给后续插件、命令或主 LLM。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7bea9e9462cd3965.translation: When the plugin needs to dynamically decide whether to intercept, return __ELBOT_CODE_1__ in the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ response of stdout: __ELBOT_CODE_2__ indicates that the current plugin takes over the message, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ indicates that it should be passed to subsequent plugins, commands, or the main LLM.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7cc95ac3cab598fa.source: 表情 Hook 已从内嵌插件改为规则 Hook 示例，见本文档[表情提取示例](#表情提取示例)。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7cc95ac3cab598fa.translation: The Emoji Hook has been changed from an embedded plugin to a Rule Hook example; see the [Emoji Extraction Example](#表情提取示例) in this document.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7cfc3d4f9b7937f4.source: Host 先写入 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ request，收到成功 response 后再写入 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ request。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7cfc3d4f9b7937f4.translation: The Host first writes the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ request, and after receiving a successful response, it writes the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ request.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7d0acb7d3f4297c6.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、stdout __ELBOT_CODE_2__ frame 的 __ELBOT_CODE_3__ 字段、__ELBOT_CODE_4__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_5__，以及 TOML send action 的 __ELBOT_CODE_6__ 使用的常见片段字段：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7d0acb7d3f4297c6.translation: Common fragment fields used by __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, the __ELBOT_CODE_3__ field of stdout __ELBOT_CODE_2__ frame, __ELBOT_CODE_5__ of __ELBOT_CODE_4__, and __ELBOT_CODE_6__ of TOML send action:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7e5faf97ce03552e.source: 除 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 文件目录外，所有持久 Hook 共享一个进程内 JSON KV：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7e5faf97ce03552e.translation: Except for the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ file directory, all persistent Hooks share an in-process JSON KV:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7e723a988d39966d.source: 若显式填写，只能等于当前事件平台。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7e723a988d39966d.translation: If explicitly filled, it must equal the current event platform.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7e7f3bc368532df6.source: 持久 Hook 不应假定 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 已去掉唤醒前缀：它保留平台归一化后的原始 segments；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7e7f3bc368532df6.translation: Persistent Hooks should not assume that __ELBOT_CODE_0__ has had the wake-up prefix removed: it retains the original segments after platform normalization;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7ee68c09489d22ef.source: 未知模板、未知 action 名或不存在的捕获路径会原样保留，便于把它们作为普通文本使用。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:7ee68c09489d22ef.translation: Unknown templates, unknown action names, or non-existent capture paths will be kept as-is, making it easy to use them as plain text.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:802b15dd9b89e33b.translation: When omitted, it will still be processed according to the configuration.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:81e052eb0866021f.source: 插件配置文件可以包含 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 元信息和自己的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。插件规则里的本地相对路径和相对 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 都基于该插件配置所在目录解析。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:81e052eb0866021f.translation: Plugin configuration files can contain __ELBOT_CODE_0__ metadata and their own __ELBOT_CODE_1__. Local relative paths and paths relative to __ELBOT_CODE_2__ in plugin rules are resolved based on the directory where the plugin configuration is located.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:820dea88e817a25e.source: 相对 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 相对插件目录解析。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:820dea88e817a25e.translation: Parsed relative to the plugin directory relative to __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:827efb9ca591257a.source: 根 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的解析失败会使本次规则配置加载失败；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:827efb9ca591257a.translation: Parsing failure of the root __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will cause the current rule configuration loading to fail;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:82ab4364610ec29a.source: Hook 在 ElBot 的关键边界运行：它可以观察或修改事件、追加输出意图，或把事件交给外部进程。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:82ab4364610ec29a.translation: Hooks run at the critical boundaries of ElBot: they can observe or modify events, append output intents, or hand over events to external processes.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:84797baf9075afc7.source: 规则 Hook 主配置固定在配置目录的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:84797baf9075afc7.translation: The main configuration for rule Hooks is fixed at __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in the configuration directory.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:84d766e1be2e9f1c.source: 规则 TOML 使用 snake_case target：

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:852107be7eac4705.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会使配置校验失败。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:852107be7eac4705.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will cause configuration validation to fail.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:86c6efa81c019df8.source: 需要管道、重定向、__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 等 shell 语法时，请显式写 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 或平台对应解释器。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:86c6efa81c019df8.translation: When pipes, redirection, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, or other shell syntax are required, please explicitly write __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, or the corresponding interpreter for the platform.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:88364b50b04c096d.source: 实际替换等当前 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 结束后发生：仅替换调用插件的规则和 worker，清理该插件 waiting 路由与工具上下文，不重启其他插件。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:88364b50b04c096d.translation: The actual replacement occurs after the current __ELBOT_CODE_0__ ends: only the rules and workers that call the plugin are replaced, the waiting routes and tool contexts of that plugin are cleared, and other plugins are not restarted.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:887483aa61698200.translation: stdout frames that the script can write:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:88e72920d61775f9.source: 后台无 origin 时调用主体为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，插件应特别谨慎处理授权。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:88e72920d61775f9.translation: When there is no origin in the background, the calling entity is __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and plugins should handle authorization with particular caution.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:89a736a4e39677f5.source: 例如，查询插件缺少参数时返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和“请输入查询内容”；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:89a736a4e39677f5.translation: For example, when a query plugin is missing parameters, return __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and "Please enter the query content";

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8c4d744b57827c9e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只能是 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_3__，省略时为 __ELBOT_CODE_4__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8c4d744b57827c9e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can only be __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, or __ELBOT_CODE_3__; it defaults to __ELBOT_CODE_4__ if omitted.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8d7d84d60383b868.source: 后台调用必须位于 __ELBOT_CODE_0__：有 Host 签发上下文时把它放入 __ELBOT_CODE_1__；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8d7d84d60383b868.translation: Background calls must be located in __ELBOT_CODE_0__: when there is a context issued by the Host, place it in __ELBOT_CODE_1__;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8dc0b277889a46a8.source: Hook 里可通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 读取被引用消息的平台消息 ID，通过 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 读取当前触发 Hook 的消息 ID。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8dc0b277889a46a8.translation: In the Hook, the platform message ID of the quoted message can be read via __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and the message ID that triggered the current Hook can be read via __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8f3f504569a09be9.source: 持久 Hook 修改自身 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 后可请求重载自己：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8f3f504569a09be9.translation: After a persistent Hook modifies its own __ELBOT_CODE_0__, it can request to reload itself:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8f9bae6e5f3294ec.source: 下面内容在ElBot第一次运行时自动生成在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，用于让 LLM 按需求生成规则 Hook 配置和可选 exec 脚本。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:8f9bae6e5f3294ec.translation: The following content is automatically generated in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ when ElBot runs for the first time, to allow the LLM to generate rule Hook configurations and optional exec scripts as needed.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:91154873dc9ff608.source: 如果规则设置 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，本次消息到此结束，不进入命令或 LLM；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:91154873dc9ff608.translation: If the rule sets __ELBOT_CODE_0__, the current message ends here and will not enter the command or LLM;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:915b4886dded51c0.source: 可用于 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 和模板的文本字段：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:915b4886dded51c0.translation: Text fields that can be used in __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and templates:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:928c99e7646e7f60.source: 所有持久运行字段都必须显式填写。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:928c99e7646e7f60.translation: All persistent runtime fields must be explicitly filled.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:92d99a661cc8c3d9.source: 持久 Hook 仍是 Hook，不存在独立的插件系统或 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 命令。它由插件自己的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 声明：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:92d99a661cc8c3d9.translation: A Persistent Hook is still a Hook; there is no independent plugin system or __ELBOT_CODE_0__ command. It is declared by the plugin's own __ELBOT_CODE_1__:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:93da8330724bf960.source: 省略 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示仅当 key 不存在时写入，显式 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 表示当前值必须是 JSON __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:93da8330724bf960.translation: Omitting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates writing only if the key does not exist; explicitly specifying __ELBOT_CODE_1__ indicates that the current value must be JSON __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:95e58d7b95fe0124.source: 它支持单引号、双引号及引号/反斜杠的有限转义；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:95e58d7b95fe0124.translation: It supports single quotes, double quotes, and limited escaping of quotes/backslashes;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97636c8c7c216f1c.source: shell 语法应显式调用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或平台解释器。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97636c8c7c216f1c.translation: Shell syntax should explicitly call __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or a platform interpreter.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97c1dff5678a4130.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会重新读取规则与持久运行配置，并停止、替换或启动对应的持久 Hook。配置变更不做动态 schema patch，重载会重启受影响进程。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97c1dff5678a4130.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will reread the rules and persistent runtime configuration, and stop, replace, or start the corresponding persistent Hooks. Configuration changes do not perform dynamic schema patches; reloading will restart the affected processes.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97d2efe255445eb3.source: Hook 应先依据外层 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 判断通用成功。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97d2efe255445eb3.translation: Hooks should first determine general success based on the outer __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97d54f103a29f122.source: 配置目录的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是规则入口。它可以直接包含 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，也可以引用插件目录：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:97d54f103a29f122.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in the configuration directory is the rule entry point. It can directly contain __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or reference plugin directories:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:98c36d56db840c16.source: 调用已注册工具，结果存到 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 供后续 action 使用。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:98c36d56db840c16.translation: Call a registered tool; the result is stored in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ for use by subsequent actions.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:99aed47d6dd9e6b1.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can only be omitted or set to __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:99b467e802c7e354.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会重新读取主配置和插件配置；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:99b467e802c7e354.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will reread the main configuration and plugin configurations;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:99ea17af888731f8.source: 要发送单片段消息，只需让 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只包含一个元素；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:99ea17af888731f8.translation: To send a single-fragment message, simply make __ELBOT_CODE_0__ contain only one element;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9a86c3e1d296f1f2.source: ElBot 会注册这些 Hook 来源：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9a86c3e1d296f1f2.translation: ElBot will register these Hook sources:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9ad1825089c2c84b.source: 普通规则使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。规则按 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、匹配条件、角色和优先级筛选后，依次执行 actions。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9ad1825089c2c84b.translation: Ordinary rules use __ELBOT_CODE_0__. After rules are filtered by __ELBOT_CODE_1__, matching conditions, roles, and priority, the actions are executed in sequence.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9be0c997f0beb65a.source: 注意：__ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 等是规则匹配和模板变量里的派生字段，不是 init JSON 里的同名字段。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9be0c997f0beb65a.translation: Note: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, etc., are derived fields in rule matching and template variables, not fields with the same name in the init JSON.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9c03165cf3a6ea4d.source: 条件可写单条件简写，或写 AND 数组，二者不能混用：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9c03165cf3a6ea4d.translation: Conditions can be written as a single condition shorthand or as an AND array; the two cannot be used interchangeably:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9cc5cb04f193f09d.source: 它在常规 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Hook 完成且未 consume 后、命令和主 LLM 前执行。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9cc5cb04f193f09d.translation: It is executed after the regular __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Hook is completed and not consumed, and before the command and the main LLM.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9d6ea955dae50797.source: exec 使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 行协议：ElBot 启动脚本后，会先向 stdin 写一行 init JSON；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9d6ea955dae50797.translation: exec uses the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ line protocol: after ElBot starts the script, it first writes a line of init JSON to stdin;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9d996eceeb1aa9be.source: 它不会让主 LLM 自动处理这些消息。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9d996eceeb1aa9be.translation: It will not let the main LLM process these messages automatically.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9e13635ee1f1af3e.source: TOML 使用严格字段校验，未知字段会报错。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9e13635ee1f1af3e.translation: TOML uses strict field validation; unknown fields will cause an error.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9e7503bdb22f6c97.source: 通常省略 target 以沿用当前事件。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9e7503bdb22f6c97.translation: Usually, target is omitted to reuse the current event.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9f3766aa5347107a.source: OneBot 也可以不用 capability，直接 raw 调用：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:9f3766aa5347107a.translation: OneBot can also perform a raw call directly without using capabilities:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a0286e96994e66fc.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只允许 Hook 观察未唤起消息，不会让主 LLM 自动处理它们。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a0286e96994e66fc.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only allows Hooks to observe un-invoked messages and will not let the main LLM process them automatically.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a055762a1bdc0699.source: 脚本从 stdin 读取 event JSON，提取 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，检查 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 目录是否有图片，有则生成 emoticon output 并从文本中移除 token，无则保留原样。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a055762a1bdc0699.translation: The script reads the event JSON from stdin, extracts __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and checks if there are images in the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ directory. If images exist, it generates an emoticon output and removes the token from the text; otherwise, it keeps the text as is.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a1dbc235f7c7698b.source: Hook 主动请求 Host 能力时使用：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a1dbc235f7c7698b.translation: Used when the Hook actively requests Host capabilities:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a2acccd80932a623.source: 未命名 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 使用工具名作为结果名；未命名 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 使用 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。同一规则内多个未命名 exec 会覆盖同一结果，需模板引用时应显式命名。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a2acccd80932a623.translation: Unnamed __ELBOT_CODE_0__ uses the tool name as the result name; unnamed __ELBOT_CODE_1__ uses __ELBOT_CODE_2__. Multiple unnamed execs within the same rule will overwrite the same result; they should be explicitly named when template referencing is required.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a44d652eb99a368a.source: 其中 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 是匹配/模板时计算的虚拟文本字段，不直接存在于 event JSON；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a44d652eb99a368a.translation: Among these, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ are virtual text fields calculated during matching/templating and do not exist directly in the event JSON;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a563960b939e2332.source: 持久 trigger rule 复用规则 Hook 的匹配、角色、priority 和 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 语义。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a563960b939e2332.translation: Persistent trigger rules reuse the matching, role, priority, and __ELBOT_CODE_0__ semantics of rule Hooks.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a7fd931c2e04fcc2.source: 多个 regex 条件的序号从 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 开始，只计算 regex 条件本身。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a7fd931c2e04fcc2.translation: The index for multiple regex conditions starts from __ELBOT_CODE_0__, counting only the regex conditions themselves.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a835374e15b51f91.source: 平台调用会进入审计日志，并且只能调用当前事件所属平台，不能从一个平台 Hook 跨到另一个平台。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a835374e15b51f91.translation: Platform calls will be entered into the audit log, and only the platform to which the current event belongs can be called; it is not possible to cross from one platform Hook to another platform.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a99b0602caaf93a6.source: 可编辑字段严格取决于 Hook 点，见上方 Hook 点表。其他字段即使可匹配或可作为模板，也不能编辑。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a99b0602caaf93a6.translation: Editable fields strictly depend on the Hook point; see the Hook point table above. Other fields cannot be edited even if they can be matched or used as templates.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a9c0b60a1c0a4a02.source: 未处理时省略或返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，消息会继续交给后续规则或主 LLM。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:a9c0b60a1c0a4a02.translation: Omit or return __ELBOT_CODE_0__ when not processed; the message will continue to be passed to subsequent rules or the main LLM.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:aa4b5a6564f86421.source: 单次 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 最多可调用 32 次，且在 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 到期、取消或 worker 重载后失效。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:aa4b5a6564f86421.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of a single __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be called up to 32 times, and becomes invalid after __ELBOT_CODE_2__ expires, is cancelled, or the worker is reloaded.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:aac15fac6de00228.source: 省略 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 才表示不修改字段。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:aac15fac6de00228.translation: Omitting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ indicates that the field will not be modified.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ac0a63f2d5729e01.source: 单输出快速写法支持与 outputs segment 相同的字段，内部等价于单元素 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ac0a63f2d5729e01.translation: The single-output shorthand supports the same fields as output segments and is internally equivalent to a single-element __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ad1a4dcdebbc435a.source: 默认 stdin 是包含完整 event 和 match 上下文的 JSON。也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 字段自定义 stdin 内容（支持模板渲染）。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ad1a4dcdebbc435a.translation: By default, stdin is a JSON containing the full event and match context. You can also use the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ field to customize the stdin content (template rendering is supported).

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:adb769cd0fd2c4d4.source: 不要在唯一读取 stdin 的协议循环中同步等待该 response；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:adb769cd0fd2c4d4.translation: Do not synchronously wait for the response within the protocol loop that is the sole reader of stdin;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ae1f4a1833c594e1.source: 其实际生效范围见 Hook 点表。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ae1f4a1833c594e1.translation: See the Hook point table for its actual effective scope.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:af27e7b3f38c054c.source: 失败时只返回外层错误：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:af27e7b3f38c054c.translation: Return only the outer error upon failure:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:af420a726ca0bb98.source: 其结构没有跨平台约定，Hook 应以外层 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 判断通用成功，只有明确依赖某个平台 API 时才解析 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:af420a726ca0bb98.translation: Its structure has no cross-platform convention; the Hook should use the outer __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to determine general success, and only parse __ELBOT_CODE_1__ when there is an explicit dependency on a specific platform API.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b0fb1f4c145372d7.source: 具体以图片还是文件形式发送由 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 决定：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b0fb1f4c145372d7.translation: Whether it is sent as an image or a file is determined by __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b3a5a6971bc46f04.translation: stderr is not used as protocol data;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b3d35fda38a2980c.source: 脚本成功时只进入日志，脚本失败、超时、崩溃或协议错误时会把 stderr 尾部并入 Hook 失败通知。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b3d35fda38a2980c.translation: When the script succeeds, it only goes to the logs; when the script fails, times out, crashes, or has a protocol error, the end of stderr will be merged into the Hook failure notification.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b403da97c6046214.source: value 必须是合法 JSON，压缩后单值最大 1 MiB，共享区最大 32 MiB。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b403da97c6046214.translation: The value must be valid JSON, with a maximum size of 1 MiB per value after compression and a maximum of 32 MiB for the shared area.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b5f5fb704617c59e.source: 空字符串合法，省略 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 才表示不改。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b5f5fb704617c59e.translation: Empty strings are valid; omitting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ indicates no change.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b60c33c968e10f11.source: Hook 工具调用不会写入 Agent Session。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b60c33c968e10f11.translation: Hook tool calls will not be written to the Agent Session.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b6286c394777fd69.source: ElBot 写回 stdin 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ frame 字段：

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b77e74c6ed83f862.translation: Text fields and exec command/stdin support __ELBOT_CODE_0__ template rendering:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b93ebdb845d5fc64.source: Hook 不直接发送平台消息；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b93ebdb845d5fc64.translation: Hooks do not send platform messages directly;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b947caab7f7bc750.source: 单个 stdout 协议帧最大 16 MiB。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b947caab7f7bc750.translation: A single stdout protocol frame is at most 16 MiB.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b96f28484b53b048.source: 一次性 exec 的大媒体应写到插件目录或 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，然后返回 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b96f28484b53b048.translation: Large media for one-time exec should be written to the plugin directory or __ELBOT_CODE_0__, then return __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or __ELBOT_CODE_2__;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:b9cb12fe1c6e2b7a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ does not implicitly go through a shell.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ba25d37a0a7d8a63.source: 否则 Host 回写无人读取而死锁。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ba25d37a0a7d8a63.translation: otherwise, the Host's write-back will have no reader, leading to a deadlock.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:baeab4d5f9a7274d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 在两种 actions 形式中都可用。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:baeab4d5f9a7274d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is available in both action forms.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bc1e5a153fd26f8e.source: 空字符串是合法值，表示清空字段。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bc1e5a153fd26f8e.translation: An empty string is a valid value, indicating that the field should be cleared.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bc28b34924ae5850.source: 处理失败时返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，不写 __ELBOT_CODE_2__：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bc28b34924ae5850.translation: When processing fails, return __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and do not write __ELBOT_CODE_2__:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bc3a90315507d5a4.translation: Group chats will not capture other members, nor do they require the initiator to @ again.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:be0c7c253c392725.translation: If you want the Hook to passively listen to ordinary group messages, set:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bedf2578a66855c5.source: 持久 Hook 自行维护 LLM loop、业务状态和工具使用决策。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bedf2578a66855c5.translation: Persistent Hooks maintain their own LLM loop, business state, and tool usage decisions.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bf09daac97e47a6d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会按空白拆分为可执行程序和参数后直接执行，不会隐式套 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:bf09daac97e47a6d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be split by whitespace into an executable program and arguments and then executed directly, without implicitly wrapping it in __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c152f22b7b4db7f5.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 从 action 继承到所有 segment。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c152f22b7b4db7f5.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ are inherited from the action to all segments.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c21e56a0408f816b.source: 一次性 exec 与持久 Hook 都使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ JSON Lines：stdin 和 stdout 的每行都是一个 JSON 帧；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c21e56a0408f816b.translation: Both one-time exec and persistent Hooks use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ JSON Lines: each line of stdin and stdout is a JSON frame;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c304f09b36571a46.source: 规则 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、一次性 exec、临时 Hook 和持久 Hook 使用同一套输出 segment。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c304f09b36571a46.translation: Rules __ELBOT_CODE_0__, one-time exec, temporary Hooks, and persistent Hooks use the same set of output segments.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c33ea8a70cdca112.source: ElBot 会向脚本 stdin 写入 response frame：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c33ea8a70cdca112.translation: ElBot will write the response frame to the script's stdin:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c37bfe3415fc60b8.source: Host ID 使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，Hook 主动 request ID 使用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c37bfe3415fc60b8.translation: Host ID uses __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and Hook active request ID uses __ELBOT_CODE_1__;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c40bacb9a198a6ac.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 列出的是成功注册的规则名，例如 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，不是 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 的插件名。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c40bacb9a198a6ac.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ lists the successfully registered rule names, such as __ELBOT_CODE_1__, not the plugin names of __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c4401cd7f60b21fd.source: 一个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 内若显式指定 target，所有片段的 target 必须一致。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c4401cd7f60b21fd.translation: If a target is explicitly specified within a __ELBOT_CODE_0__, the target of all fragments must be consistent.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c466628e3d4b2784.source: 自动回复并阻止后续命令/LLM 时，优先用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ + __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c466628e3d4b2784.translation: When automatically replying and blocking subsequent commands/LLM, prioritize using __ELBOT_CODE_0__ + __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c4dd0f4714f1602a.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 不创建 worker，也不要求其余 runtime 字段。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c4dd0f4714f1602a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ does not create a worker and does not require other runtime fields.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c5a516c43ee0c3a3.source: 处理文本指令时，应优先读取 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，为空再拼接 text segments：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c5a516c43ee0c3a3.translation: When handling text commands, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ should be read preferentially; if it is empty, concatenate the text segments:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c5c328d6f0722512.source: 脚本写出合法 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ frame 后应以 0 退出；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c5c328d6f0722512.translation: After the script writes a valid __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ frame, it should exit with 0;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c63612d1a7a3026e.source: 两个控制字段是插件未返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时的默认行为。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c63612d1a7a3026e.translation: The two control fields are the default behaviors when the plugin does not return __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c67d8f37958ab0d6.source: Telegram 使用 Bot API __ELBOT_CODE_0__，机器人必须有删除目标消息的权限，且目标消息不能超过平台允许的删除时限。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c67d8f37958ab0d6.translation: Telegram uses Bot API __ELBOT_CODE_0__; the bot must have permission to delete the target message, and the target message must not exceed the deletion time limit allowed by the platform.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c71587577a070498.source: 规则的多段输出使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，一次性 exec response 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 使用相同 segment 格式：
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c71587577a070498.translation: Multi-segment outputs of rules use __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of one-time exec responses use the same segment format:

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c7a8df1f9294d70f.source: 写入 shared KV 的 key 必须为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c7a8df1f9294d70f.translation: The key written to the shared KV must be __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c845375650fb802d.source: 停止时 Host 先请求 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，超过关闭超时才强制结束进程。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c845375650fb802d.translation: When stopping, the Host first requests __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and the process is forcibly terminated only after the shutdown timeout is exceeded.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c87b9c314889c126.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 等 request 失败时，脚本会先收到 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 的 response；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c87b9c314889c126.translation: When requests such as __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ fail, the script will first receive a response from __ELBOT_CODE_2__;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c95c0f38cb82a3a7.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 不能与 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 组合使用；__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 不能与 __ELBOT_CODE_4__ 组合使用。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c95c0f38cb82a3a7.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ cannot be used in combination with __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or __ELBOT_CODE_2__; __ELBOT_CODE_3__ cannot be used in combination with __ELBOT_CODE_4__.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c9838b82a028b669.source: 以下示例用于超级管理员回复某条平台消息并发送“撤回”时，通过 Elvena v3 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 调用平台 API 撤回被引用的消息。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:c9838b82a028b669.translation: The following example is used when a superadmin replies to a platform message and sends "recall", calling the platform API via Elvena v3 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to recall the quoted message.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ca5edb8b6e867e02.source: 配置不做动态 schema patch，受影响 worker 会重启。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ca5edb8b6e867e02.translation: Configurations are not dynamically schema-patched; affected workers will restart.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:caaf3410488de286.source: 一次性 exec 只处理一个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 后退出；
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:caaf3410488de286.translation: A one-time exec exits after processing a single __ELBOT_CODE_0__;

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cb2534b1d61a4bf7.source: 如果某个插件被跳过，会在命令结果里显示 warning。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cb2534b1d61a4bf7.translation: If a plugin is skipped, a warning will be displayed in the command result.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cc539518b504c93a.source: 插件必须自行承担工具授权和风险控制。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cc539518b504c93a.translation: Plugins must handle tool authorization and risk control on their own.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cc79db914b892f96.source: Host 发起的 request ID 必须以 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 开头，Hook 发起的 request ID 必须以 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 开头，response 必须复用对应 request ID。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cc79db914b892f96.translation: Request IDs initiated by the Host must start with __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and request IDs initiated by the Hook must start with __ELBOT_CODE_1__; responses must reuse the corresponding request ID.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cd02a0f87d7051f6.translation: Alternatively, multiple lines of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ frames can be written.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cd9c22a4fe20b26b.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 通常用于 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ Hook：发送输出后阻止后续命令和 LLM 处理，让 Hook 完全接管消息。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:cd9c22a4fe20b26b.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is typically used for __ELBOT_CODE_1__ Hooks: it blocks subsequent commands and LLM processing after sending output, allowing the Hook to take full control of the message.

docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ce7cca2d4ea553bc.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以用于条件匹配，但不能被编辑。
docs/hooks.md:paragraph:ce7cca2d4ea553bc.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be used for conditional matching, but cannot be edited.

docs/hooks.md:table:a28f54a6904af5951723.source: 工具错误；通常仅用于错误上下文
docs/hooks.md:table:a28f54a6904af5951723.translation: Tool error; usually used only in error contexts

docs/hooks.md:table:a2dd9126ce3da0d51045.source: 唤起策略：__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 仅处理已唤起消息（默认），__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 无论是否唤起都处理，__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 仅处理未唤起消息。
docs/hooks.md:table:a2dd9126ce3da0d51045.translation: Wake-up strategy: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only processes awakened messages (default), __ELBOT_CODE_1__ processes regardless of whether it is awakened, __ELBOT_CODE_2__ only processes non-awakened messages.

docs/hooks.md:table:a2fe8fa487fdb10a65ef.source: 启动命令，不经过 shell，当前按空白简单拆分，**不解析引号**；参数含空格时请通过脚本包装或避免该路径。
docs/hooks.md:table:a2fe8fa487fdb10a65ef.translation: Startup command, executed without a shell. Currently split simply by whitespace, **quotes are not parsed**; if parameters contain spaces, please wrap them in a script or avoid this path.

docs/hooks.md:table:a499ef9ca710d754baf3.source: 调用当前平台原始 API；不能跨平台调用
docs/hooks.md:table:a499ef9ca710d754baf3.translation: Call the current platform's original API; cannot be called across platforms

docs/hooks.md:table:a5123168b9a2fa69ff19.source: 以当前 Actor 的普通 Hook 权限调用低风险工具。
docs/hooks.md:table:a5123168b9a2fa69ff19.translation: Call low-risk tools with the normal Hook permissions of the current Actor.

docs/hooks.md:table:a5cf6d154a4707eefe64.source: 每次事件独立交给外部程序，处理完即退出

docs/hooks.md:table:a7b0e5721e2068336b14.source: 字段的文本值非空才匹配；空字符串和当前事件未提供的字段都不匹配。
docs/hooks.md:table:a7b0e5721e2068336b14.translation: Matches only if the text value of the field is not empty; empty strings and fields not provided in the current event do not match.

docs/hooks.md:table:aa626be0d161b3e9aedc.source: 被引用消息的可读内容文本，可能包含图片/文件占位

docs/hooks.md:table:ac77c5bd862b40c591db.translation: The array of available tool schemas for this request

docs/hooks.md:table:ae0c7b37466a0fb6da59.source: 指数退避上限，必须不小于初始延迟。
docs/hooks.md:table:ae0c7b37466a0fb6da59.translation: The upper limit for exponential backoff, which must not be less than the initial delay.

docs/hooks.md:table:ae6abebaff9cd73995dc.source: 在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中为 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 时，发送当前 outputs 后不再进入命令或主 LLM。
docs/hooks.md:table:ae6abebaff9cd73995dc.translation: When set to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ in __ELBOT_CODE_0__, it will no longer enter commands or the main LLM after sending the current outputs.

docs/hooks.md:table:af084542c0df89a34924.translation: Maximum seconds to wait for a successful response from __ELBOT_CODE_0__, must be greater than __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/hooks.md:table:b0b47afe70e05ef2c894.translation: Working directory of the exec process

docs/hooks.md:table:b0db20571d8d46ca1f91.source: 无条件匹配，不能设 field 或 value
docs/hooks.md:table:b0db20571d8d46ca1f91.translation: Unconditional match; field or value cannot be set

docs/hooks.md:table:b4dc69800f19228fb4a9.translation: User intent after removing the wake-up prefix; message input Hooks should generally prioritize using it.

docs/hooks.md:table:b5ee41f2b9dd3895d779.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时必填的非空不透明 ID。
docs/hooks.md:table:b5ee41f2b9dd3895d779.translation: A required non-empty opaque ID when __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:table:b62450565373c1822d1c.translation: Completely stop distributing events from the specified user, format __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:table:b93f5501f37213d4c89b.source: 当前 Hook 事件上下文；字段按 Hook 点填充，不相关字段为空、零值或省略

docs/hooks.md:table:ba693f506dac1f379301.translation: Start a one-time external Hook and process it according to hook.v2.

docs/hooks.md:table:c11d79daebf6ad346970.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只在规则命中后启动，并在会话结束后退出。

docs/hooks.md:table:c2614fbfd06ec67766ae.translation: Declared name; it is recommended to be consistent with the root __ELBOT_CODE_0__. If inconsistent, the root ID prevails and a warning is logged.

docs/hooks.md:table:c4a66d1b72e509f0b12e.translation: Request type: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__; empty when there are no running Requests

docs/hooks.md:table:cdadd479a79ba7c4f070.translation: Default is __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is also handled according to the default value.

docs/hooks.md:table:d3d2d691105e32cdbe12.translation: Required, an array of output segment objects

docs/hooks.md:table:d5485c3d71ec0d0e2879.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只接受 HTTP(S)，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 只接受文件系统路径且相对插件目录解析，__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 解码后最大 10 MiB。
docs/hooks.md:table:d5485c3d71ec0d0e2879.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only accepts HTTP(S), __ELBOT_CODE_1__ only accepts filesystem paths resolved relative to the plugin directory, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ has a maximum size of 10 MiB after decoding.

docs/hooks.md:table:e4cf3c406f3996231f3a.translation: Optional; once set, ElBot will return __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ upon success

docs/hooks.md:table:eee7b324ccbdb8e88292.source: 片段类型；入站消息常见为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__，输出还支持 __ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__、__ELBOT_CODE_5__
docs/hooks.md:table:eee7b324ccbdb8e88292.translation: Fragment type; common for inbound messages are __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and output also supports __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__

docs/hooks.md:table:ef00bf15982334816fa6.source: 完全不分发指定平台的事件，例如 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/hooks.md:table:ef00bf15982334816fa6.translation: Completely stop distributing events from the specified platform, such as __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/hooks.md:table:efec637b28c1fb0ff5c3.source: 普通路径按平台默认方式处理，__ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 前缀表示调用方已指定媒体源，会按平台能力直接处理
docs/hooks.md:table:efec637b28c1fb0ff5c3.translation: Ordinary paths are handled according to the platform's default method; prefixes __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ indicate that the caller has specified the media source, which will be handled directly according to the platform's capabilities.

docs/hooks.md:table:f35e40690c9cc6806017.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 与状态列表使用的简介。
docs/hooks.md:table:f35e40690c9cc6806017.translation: A brief description of __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and the status list.

docs/hooks.md:table:f529562ab30e9c2113a0.translation: Local resource path; resolved relative to __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or the plugin directory during output

docs/hooks.md:table:f7be8301bd1490d75574.source: 立即经 Output Manager 发送 outputs。
docs/hooks.md:table:f7be8301bd1490d75574.translation: Immediately send outputs via the Output Manager.

docs/hooks.md:table:fa5d02ba22da130ca307.source: 相对 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的配置路径，默认 __ELBOT_CODE_1__；不能是绝对路径或逃出 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/hooks.md:table:fa5d02ba22da130ca307.translation: Configuration path relative to __ELBOT_CODE_0__, default __ELBOT_CODE_1__; it cannot be an absolute path or escape __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/hooks.md:table:fa8e48a3ddf2518ff362.source: LLM 返回的工具调用数组
docs/hooks.md:table:fa8e48a3ddf2518ff362.translation: Tool call array returned by the LLM

docs/hooks.md:table:fb58c0064dfe04a617b0.translation: Has a value only when the current message is a reply to someone else

docs/hooks.md:table:fb6151152e88793d28b0.source: 正常结束；可带 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示本规则不生效并回滚此前 action 效果
docs/hooks.md:table:fb6151152e88793d28b0.translation: Normal termination; can include __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to indicate that this rule is not effective and to roll back previous action effects

docs/hooks.md:table:fcd4a110825e342484d3.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 必须且只能选择一种来源。

docs/hooks.md:table:fe46c14aa33a889ead26.source: Request 类型：__ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__；无运行中 Request 时为空
docs/hooks.md:table:fe46c14aa33a889ead26.translation: Request type: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__; empty when there is no running Request

docs/hooks.md:table:febd131515af1dd27e7f.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示接管消息，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 表示完整放行，省略时使用 trigger rule 的 __ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__。
docs/hooks.md:table:febd131515af1dd27e7f.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates taking over the message, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ indicates full pass-through; when omitted, __ELBOT_CODE_2__ and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ of the trigger rule are used.

docs/hooks.md:table:fed8b16469f6db55f26e.source: 图片或文件的显示名和 MIME 类型；__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 也可作为原生表情的可读名称。
docs/hooks.md:table:fed8b16469f6db55f26e.translation: Display name and MIME type of the image or file; __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can also serve as the readable name of a native emoji.
